# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is a benchmark-style comparative evaluation with real test outcomes and tool-specific performance judgments.

## Why

The source presents a structured comparison of multiple coding agents based on explicit hands-on tasks, including setup speed, deployment performance, code quality, prototype performance, large-context refactors, and task outcomes on real codebase exercises. That is enough empirical substance to qualify as institute-worthy admission material.

## Limits
